titleStmt.title: SII 10.651: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 651. (A.R. No. 99 of 1909.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR PARAVASTU RANGĀCHĀRYA'S HOUSE AT VIZAGAPATAM. Ś. 101[3] (h) 17th year of Anantavarmadēva.

summary.p: Records the gift of “perumbaḍi” (?) by the “city twelve” of Viśākhapaṭṭaṇamu alias Kulōttuṅga-Chōḍapaṭṭaṇamu to Mātāmana of Malamaṇḍala. The description of the donee is not quite intelligible.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmadanaṁttava¨rmmadēvara pra
va¨rddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu
17 nēṁṭi śakavaruṣaṁbu 1013nēṁṭṭi kanya kri
ṣṇa 10 sōmavāramunāṁḍu śrīmatuviśā
khapaṭṭaṇa maina kulōttuṁggacōḍapaṭṭaṇamu
na nagaramu panniddaṟunu māttōṭṭamāna maku
lavallipaṭṭaṇamuna Aṁjjuvaṇṇatu vyā
pāri pattanāditya nānārājavidyādharasamaṁkattughaṁṭṭi Āsāvanapa
dinenmidibhūminagarasēnāpati Ayina malamāṁḍala mātāmanaku ni
ccina śāsanapatramu viśākhapaṭṭaṇa maina kulōttuṁggacōḍapaṭṭaṇamuna
Anyānuva peruṁbaḍiki tū¨rpuna sīmasaṁddhi ṟāprākāruvu dakṣaṇasīmasa
ṁddhi dēvāṁḍiyillu mēra paścimasīma saṁddhi Uppuṭēṟu Uttarasīma sa
ṁddhi dammaṟummi velakuṁ goni viḍicina yillu lōpugā nullanyūṭṭuva
raṁpallini Ācaṁdrā¨rkamu niccitimi palliri lōpaina Iḷlaku Āru
vanamu kānki maṁbaḻsu vīnipari
hariṁccitimi dīniki vighnamu sēsinavāru
gaṁgga kaṟta vēyu gavilala brāhmaṇula vadhiṁccina pātakamuṁ bo
ṁdduduru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁddharāṁ
ṣaṣṭiṁ va·rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.651 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
